title: selaginella thurnwaldiana
intro: Selaginella thurnwaldiana, also known as the spikemoss, is a small, evergreen plant species that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella thurnwaldiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
